components.name: ActionPanel
components.description: A panel displaying a row of action items with optional drag-and-drop support and CSS transition animations. Each item renders an icon and title, and can optionally be wrapped in a custom container.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of action items to display in the panel

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class for the panel container

props.name: disable
props.description: When true, hides the panel (or triggers exit animation if toggleAnimation is enabled)

props.name: toggleAnimation
props.description: When true, uses CSSTransition to animate panel visibility changes

components.name: ActionPanelItemContainer
components.description: Renders a single action panel item with an icon and title. Supports drag-and-drop via useDnDItemProps hook.

props.name: item
props.description: The action panel item to render, containing id, icon, title, and optional drag/click handlers

components.name: DashKit
components.description: Main dashboard layout component that manages a grid of configurable, draggable, and resizable widgets. Supports plugin registration, edit mode with overlay controls, drag-and-drop between groups, mobile layout, and auto-updating. Provides static methods for plugin management and config manipulation.

props.name: config
props.description: Dashboard configuration object containing items, layout, aliases, and connections

props.name: editMode
props.description: Enables edit mode with dragging, resizing, and overlay controls

props.name: draggableHandleClassName
props.description: CSS class name for custom drag handles on grid items

props.name: overlayControls
props.description: Custom overlay control buttons mapped by widget type. Pass null to hide default settings button.

props.name: overlayMenuItems
props.description: Custom menu items for the overlay dropdown menu

props.name: defaultGlobalParams
props.description: Default global parameters passed to all widgets

props.name: globalParams
props.description: Global parameters passed to all widgets, overriding defaults

props.name: itemsStateAndParams
props.description: State and parameters for individual dashboard items

props.name: settings
props.description: Dashboard settings including auto-update interval and silent loading

props.name: context
props.description: Additional context object passed to all widget plugins

props.name: noOverlay
props.description: When true, disables the overlay controls on grid items in edit mode

props.name: focusable
props.description: When true, enables focus/blur handling on grid items

props.name: groups
props.description: Array of group configurations for organizing widgets into separate grid sections

props.name: onItemEdit
props.description: Callback fired when a widget's edit/settings button is clicked

props.name: onChange
props.type: (data: { config: Config; itemsStateAndParams: ItemsStateAndParams; groups?: DashKitGroup[] }) => void
props.description: Callback fired when the dashboard configuration changes (layout, params, etc.)

props.name: onDrop
props.description: Callback fired when an external item is dropped onto the dashboard

props.name: onItemMountChange
props.type: (item: ConfigItem, state: { isAsync: boolean; isMounted: boolean }) => void
props.description: Callback fired when a widget mounts or unmounts

props.name: onItemRender
props.description: Callback fired when a widget finishes rendering

props.name: getPreparedCopyItemOptions
props.description: Transform function to modify copy options before storing to localStorage

props.name: onCopyFulfill
props.description: Callback fired after a widget copy operation completes or fails

props.name: onItemFocus
props.description: Callback fired when a grid item receives focus

props.name: onItemBlur
props.description: Callback fired when a grid item loses focus

props.name: onDragStart
props.description: Callback fired when dragging a grid item starts

props.name: onDrag
props.description: Callback fired continuously while dragging a grid item

props.name: onDragStop
props.description: Callback fired when dragging a grid item stops

props.name: onResizeStart
props.description: Callback fired when resizing a grid item starts

props.name: onResize
props.description: Callback fired continuously while resizing a grid item

props.name: onResizeStop
props.description: Callback fired when resizing a grid item stops

components.name: DashKitDnDWrapper
components.description: Context provider that enables drag-and-drop functionality between DashKit instances. Manages drag state and provides a custom drag image preview.

props.name: dragImageSrc
props.description: Custom image source URL for the drag preview. Defaults to a 1x1 transparent pixel.

props.name: onDropDragOver
props.type: (draggedItem: DraggedOverItem, sharedItem: DraggedOverItem | null) => void | boolean
props.description: Callback fired when a dragged item is over a drop target

props.name: onDragStart
props.description: Callback fired when drag operation starts

props.name: onDragEnd
props.description: Callback fired when drag operation ends

props.name: children
props.description: Child element to wrap with drag-and-drop context

components.name: GridItem
components.description: Internal grid item wrapper that renders a widget inside the dashboard grid. Handles overlay controls, focus/blur state, drag state visualization, and forwards refs to plugin instances.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the grid item

props.name: item
props.description: Configuration item data including type and widget data

props.name: layout
props.description: Current layout array for all grid items

props.name: adjustWidgetLayout
props.description: Function to adjust widget layout dimensions (e.g., for auto-height)

props.name: gridLayout
props.description: Grid layout configuration properties

props.name: isDragging
props.description: Whether any item is currently being dragged

props.name: isDraggedOut
props.description: Whether this item is dragged outside its parent grid

props.name: isPlaceholder
props.description: When true, renders the placeholder version of the widget

props.name: noOverlay
props.description: When true, disables overlay controls on this item

props.name: focusable
props.description: When true, enables keyboard focus handling

props.name: withCustomHandle
props.description: When true, indicates a custom drag handle class is being used

props.name: forwardedPluginRef
props.description: Callback ref to receive the plugin instance reference

props.name: onItemMountChange
props.description: Callback fired when the widget mounts or unmounts

props.name: onItemRender
props.description: Callback fired when the widget finishes rendering

props.name: onItemFocus
props.description: Callback fired when the grid item receives focus

props.name: onItemBlur
props.description: Callback fired when the grid item loses focus

components.name: GridLayout
components.description: Internal grid layout manager that renders dashboard widgets using react-grid-layout. Handles drag-and-drop between groups, layout change propagation, auto-reload scheduling, and group-based layout rendering.

props.name: ref
props.description: Forwarded ref for accessing grid layout methods like getItemsMeta and reloadItems

components.name: Item
components.description: Internal widget renderer component that delegates to registered plugin renderers. Handles async loading callbacks, placeholder rendering, and mount/unmount lifecycle notifications.

props.name: registerManager
props.description: Plugin registry manager used to look up widget type renderers

props.name: rendererProps
props.description: Props passed to the plugin renderer function

props.name: isPlaceholder
props.description: When true, renders the placeholder version via placeholderRenderer

props.name: forwardedPluginRef
props.description: Callback ref to receive the plugin instance reference

props.name: item
props.description: Configuration item with type used for plugin lookup

props.name: onItemRender
props.description: Callback fired when the widget finishes rendering

props.name: onItemMountChange
props.description: Callback fired when the widget mounts or unmounts

components.name: MobileLayout
components.description: Mobile-optimized layout component that renders dashboard widgets in a vertical list instead of a grid. Supports auto-height adjustment, group rendering, and order-based sorting.

components.name: OverlayControls
components.description: Edit mode overlay component that renders control buttons (settings, copy, delete, custom actions) on top of dashboard widgets. Supports custom control items, dropdown menus, and configurable positioning.

props.name: configItem
props.description: The configuration item this overlay is attached to

props.name: position
props.description: Position of the overlay controls relative to the widget

props.name: view
props.description: Visual style of the control buttons

props.name: size
props.description: Size of the control buttons

props.name: onItemClick
props.description: Callback fired after any overlay control action is performed

hooks.name: useCalcPropsLayout
hooks.description: Computes and memoizes the merged layout from config and registered plugin default layouts. Recalculates only when config.layout changes (deep equality check).

parameters.name: registerManager
parameters.description: Plugin registry manager for resolving default layouts

hooks.name: useDeepEqualMemo
hooks.description: A memoization hook similar to useMemo but uses deep equality (lodash isEqual) to determine if the computed value has changed. Returns the previous reference if the new value is deeply equal.

parameters.name: predicate
parameters.description: Factory function that computes the memoized value

hooks.name: useDnDItemProps
hooks.description: Returns drag-and-drop HTML props for an ActionPanel item when a DashKitDnDContext is available and the item has dragProps. Returns null if drag-and-drop is not applicable.

parameters.name: item
parameters.description: The action panel item to generate drag-and-drop props for

hooks.return_type: { draggable: true; unselectable: 'on'; onDragStart: React.DragEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>; onDragEnd: React.DragEventHandler<HTMLDivElement> } | null
